decision_needed: Correct production-profile top integration cannot be authored from the provided packet because machine-readable SSOT connection contracts are missing. The open hierarchy/signal-flow gates require instantiating and wiring manifest-owned children, but context reports ssot_connection_contracts is empty and integration_signoff_allowed is false. Inventing child interconnect semantics would violate the packet rules and SSOT authority.

options.description: Define the missing behavior in SSOT
